items.description: Marketing agency focused on brand strategy, growth systems, GTM execution, and founder positioning.

items.description: Trading and life-operations stack built for signal + execution. The core Jarvis system repository.

items.author: Matt Haynes

items.description: Strategy and venture studio layer for capital, partnerships, and operator-level incubation.

items.title: Aura H2O
items.description: Clean water initiative with public docs and community-oriented intent. Paused but part of the story.
items.author: Matt Haynes

items.title: Aura Farms
items.description: Food and agriculture direction focused on resilient local production models.
items.author: Matt Haynes

items.title: Aura BnB
items.description: Unique-stay concept currently on hold, open to seed-aligned collaboration.
items.author: Matt Haynes

items.title: Cursor AI
items.description: AI-first code editor with deep LLM integration. Fast, intelligent autocomplete and codebase-aware chat.
items.author: Cursor

items.title: Claude by Anthropic
items.description: Large language model with extended context windows and strong reasoning. Used heavily for code and analysis.
items.author: Anthropic

items.title: OpenAI Platform
items.description: GPT models, API access, assistants, and multimodal capabilities for AI-native products.
items.author: OpenAI

items.title: Perplexity AI
items.description: AI-powered answer engine with real-time web search and citation. Good for rapid research validation.
items.author: Perplexity

items.title: LangChain
items.description: Framework for developing applications powered by language models. Chains, agents, and retrieval patterns.
items.author: LangChain

items.title: CrewAI
items.description: Multi-agent orchestration framework for role-based AI teams that collaborate on complex tasks.
items.author: CrewAI

items.title: Hugging Face
items.description: Open-source ML model hub. Models, datasets, spaces, and inference APIs for every modality.
items.author: Hugging Face

items.title: Shodan
items.description: Search engine for internet-connected devices. Essential for attack surface mapping and reconnaissance.
items.author: Shodan

items.title: OWASP Top 10
items.description: The standard awareness document for web application security. Critical reading for any builder.
items.author: OWASP

items.title: Have I Been Pwned
items.description: Check if your email or phone has been compromised in a data breach. Essential operational hygiene.
items.author: Troy Hunt

items.title: VirusTotal
items.description: Multi-engine file and URL scanner. Quick validation before clicking anything sketchy.
items.author: Google

items.title: The Hacker News
items.description: Cybersecurity news and analysis. Daily reading for staying ahead of emerging threats.
items.author: THN

items.title: TradingView
items.description: Charting platform for crypto, stocks, and forex. Pine Script for custom indicators and strategy backtesting.
items.author: TradingView

items.title: Jupiter Exchange
items.description: Solana DEX aggregator. Core swap infrastructure for the Jarvis trading stack.
items.author: Jupiter

items.title: Dexscreener
items.description: Real-time token charts and pair discovery across Solana, Ethereum, and other chains.
items.author: Dexscreener

items.title: Birdeye
items.description: Solana-focused DeFi analytics with wallet tracking, token overview, and real-time price feeds.
items.author: Birdeye

items.title: CoinGecko
items.description: Comprehensive crypto data aggregator. Market caps, volumes, and fundamental metrics across chains.
items.author: CoinGecko

items.title: Notion
items.description: Connected workspace for docs, projects, and wikis. Core operational backbone for team knowledge.
items.author: Notion

items.title: Linear
items.description: Issue tracking and project management built for speed. Keyboard-first, clean, and opinionated.
items.author: Linear

items.title: Cal.com
items.description: Open-source scheduling infrastructure. Used for booking calls and meeting coordination.
items.author: Cal.com

items.title: Vercel
items.description: Frontend cloud platform. Deploy Next.js and static sites with zero-config CI/CD.
items.author: Vercel

items.title: GitHub
items.description: Version control and collaboration platform. All active repos live here across KR8TiV and Aurora orgs.
items.author: GitHub

items.title: Stripe
items.description: Payment infrastructure for the internet. Handles billing, subscriptions, and financial tooling.
items.author: Stripe

items.title: Solana
items.description: High-performance blockchain for DeFi and consumer applications. Core chain for Jarvis trading stack.
items.author: Solana Foundation

items.title: Ethereum
items.description: Smart contract platform and the anchor chain for DeFi, NFTs, and EVM-compatible protocols.
items.author: Ethereum Foundation

items.title: Alvara Protocol
items.description: ERC-7621 basket token standard for on-chain fund management and basket investing.
items.author: Alvara

items.description: Multi-chain crypto wallet for Solana, Ethereum, and Polygon. Clean UX and swap integration.

items.title: Etherscan
items.description: Ethereum blockchain explorer. Contract verification, gas tracking, and on-chain analytics.
items.author: Etherscan

items.title: Solscan
items.description: Solana blockchain explorer with transaction history, token tracking, and validator analytics.

items.title: Weavy AI
items.description: AI-powered content and workflow tool building under the KR8TiV umbrella.
items.author: Matt Haynes

items.title: GSAP (GreenSock)
items.description: Professional-grade JavaScript animation library. Powers all scroll-triggered motion on this site.
items.author: GreenSock

items.title: Three.js
items.description: 3D graphics library for the web. WebGL abstraction used for the background effects on this site.
items.author: mrdoob

items.title: Lenis Scroll
items.description: Smooth scroll library for modern websites. Buttery inertial scrolling used throughout this site.
items.author: Darkroom

items.title: Supabase
items.description: Open-source Firebase alternative. Postgres database, auth, storage, and edge functions.
items.author: Supabase

items.title: Tailwind CSS
items.description: Utility-first CSS framework for rapidly building modern interfaces without writing custom CSS.
